lines.label: Vendor booth fees
lines.note: LNY rebook @ Layout 02A — no gap-fill outreach

gifts.name: Festival Foundation
gifts.tagline: Insurance, permits, and infrastructure every festival needs.
gifts.description: CGL insurance, CSD permits, TFF coordinator, ops tents, organic marketing, and contingency — embedded in the MVP cap.
benefits: Foundation sponsor recognition on website + email

gifts.name: Festival Stage
gifts.tagline: The stage where Mid-Autumn Festival comes alive.
gifts.description: 40×30 stage tent, portable PA + mic, and two lion dances — the cultural heart of Saturday at Derr-Okamoto.

gifts.name: Safe Festival
gifts.tagline: A safe place for children to run with lanterns at dusk.
gifts.description: Security coverage during Sat festival hours (4–9 PM) and egress to 10 PM.
benefits: Safety sponsor recognition on website + email

gifts.name: Festival Amenities
gifts.tagline: Restrooms, hand-wash, and pro porter service — units stay stocked through Sat close.
gifts.description: Portable restrooms, ADA unit, and hand-wash stations for Saturday festival (deliver/load-in through 10 PM close), plus hired porters to restock toilet paper, refill hand-wash water, and keep units clean during event hours.
benefits: Named amenity sponsor on website + digital sponsor slide

lineItems.label: Porter service — Sat 2 PM–10 PM (4 units)

gifts.name: Lantern Procession
gifts.tagline: The walk that closes Mid-Autumn Festival — light moving through the park.
gifts.description: Music-driven lantern walk — children with LED lanterns, route staging, and the moment families photograph.

gifts.name: Children's Show
gifts.tagline: Mid-Autumn is for the kids — short stage sets on Saturday.
gifts.description: Sac County Fair Kids Zone model — **30–45 min blocks, 2–3 sets on Saturday** (local magic, clown, storytelling, puppetry). Participation beats spectacle. Pair with **Children's Village** for in-ground crafts, anchor hosts, and family meetup.

lineItems.label: Magic sets ×2 (45 min each — local fair acts)

gifts.name: Children's Village
gifts.tagline: Shade, crafts, anchor hosts — families regroup before the procession.
gifts.description: **Family home base** @ Derr-Okamoto — shade, stroller-friendly seating, cultural **do** stations, and a **family meetup corral** on the map. **Anchor host** runs repeat parent–toddler sessions (sing-along, story circle). **Turnkey activations** for gyms/PTAs — festival runs the craft slot; partner forwards one email. Kids make lanterns here before joining the **Lantern Procession** at dusk. **Bounce house rentals** and **owned inflatable carnival games** (deploy labor) are separate registry blocks — same **Children's Village** director when funded.
benefits: Named on activity signage + festival map

lineItems.label: Anchor host sessions (1 curated host, 3× Sat)

gifts.name: Bounce House Rentals
gifts.tagline: Rented bounce houses — vendor delivers, sets up, and hauls away.
gifts.description: **Vendor rental only** — not the coalition-owned inflatable carnival games in storage. Party-rental company delivers bounce houses for Saturday, handles setup/teardown and cleaning, and takes them back. **Children's Village** director books the vendor and zone layout; **Foundation** director confirms **CGL covers inflatables** (or rider increment below) and collects **vendor COI** naming the coalition before go. Bounce houses typically **change insurance requirements** — do not unlock without Foundation sign-off.
benefits: Named on play-zone signage + festival map

lineItems.label: Bounce house rentals ×2 (Sat — delivery, setup, teardown, vendor clean)
Safety mats / perimeter if not in rental
CGL review / rider increment for inflatables (Foundation confirms quote)

gifts.name: Inflatable Carnival Games
gifts.tagline: Our 8-station carnival games — funded deploy labor, not a rental fee.
gifts.description: cPALSs + VACOS **already own** the Magic Jump–class **8-station inflatable games** bundle ([product reference](https://www.magicjump.com/blog/inflatable-carnival-games/)). This block pays **deploy cost only** — U-Haul trailer, setup/teardown crew (meals or hired hands), cleaning, **6K portable generator + weekend fuel** (not a site-scale rental — coordinate with Power & Lighting if sharing), and **storage amortization** (U-Haul unit rent ÷ 3 flagship events). **Not** bounce houses (those are a separate rental block). **Children's Village** director runs the zone.
benefits: Named on game-station signage + festival map

lineItems.label: Setup + teardown labor (hired hands or volunteer crew meals)
Storage amortization — U-Haul unit share (÷ 3 flagships; Finance confirms)

gifts.name: Honor our Elders
gifts.tagline: Grandparents watch the procession in comfort — an MAF value made visible.
gifts.description: A restful zone with shade tent, seating, and elder tea hospitality.

gifts.name: Light Up The Park
gifts.tagline: Trees, stage, and vendor row lit for MAF — the park glows at dusk.
gifts.description: Functional power and light for stage and vendor row, plus tree uplights, string lights, and stage flowers — Mid-Autumn Festival atmosphere before the procession.

lineItems.label: Stage zone — light tower + 25 KVA generator
Tree uplights, string lights, stage flowers

gifts.name: Spread the Word
gifts.tagline: Spread the Word presented by [Sponsor] — reach families who have not found us yet.
gifts.description: Paid Meta / Instagram and boosted posts — media sponsorship, not a petty-cash ask.

gifts.name: Festival Stage+
gifts.tagline: Saturday stage at full production quality.
gifts.description: Upgrade from MVP playlist-only to concert-quality outdoor sound and basic stage lighting. Core stage ops are vendor-funded; this block adds production quality for Saturday programming.

gifts.name: Safe Festival+
gifts.description: Additional security beyond the MVP guard baseline. Core security is vendor-funded; this block adds peak-hour coverage on the single festival evening.

gifts.name: Festival Amenities+
gifts.description: Extra restroom capacity for peak Sat hours. Core amenities are vendor-funded; this block adds comfort capacity.

gifts.name: Additional amount
gifts.tagline: Top up your package toward the next tier.
gifts.description: Add any dollar amount on top of your selected gifts — for example, $100 on top of Festival Stage ($2,675) to reach Gold ($2,500+) and unlock sponsor booth spot. Does not fund a named registry feature.
benefits: Counts toward Gold tier sponsorship minimum

gifts.name: Sponsor booth spot
gifts.tagline: On-site sponsor activation — bring your own tent.
gifts.description: 10×10 sponsor activation footprint at the festival (not a vendor booth application). You provide the tent; cPALSs assigns your on-site location and recognizes you on the website.

gifts.name: Tent rental
gifts.tagline: Optional — we rent the 10×10 for your sponsor booth.
gifts.description: Capitol Tent City 10×10 tent + weights for Sat festival. Add alongside sponsor booth spot if you prefer not to bring your own tent.
benefits: Delivery + pickup handled by festival ops
Same 10×10 spec as sponsor booth footprint
